chapter_title.en: The Call to Prayer and the Establishment of Prayer and the Reward of the Muezzins

text: 883 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَنْ أَذَّنَ سَبْعَ سِنِينَ مُحْتَسِباً جَاءَ يَوْمَ اَلْقِيَامَةِ لاَ ذَنْبَ لَهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.883 - Imam (as) said:
"Whoever calls the adhan (call to prayer) for seven years with the intention of seeking Allah’s (swt) reward will come on the Day of Judgment without any sins."
